case_title: DANELLE WELLER VS. BODYLABSF ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,584.60 FILED BY WELLER, DANELLE AS TO DEFENDANT BODYLABSF RUTTER, MARIA MURPHY, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER CONTINUED TO MAR. 13, 2017 AT 1:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE MATTER FOR 6 MONTHS FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FROM MEDIATION SERVICES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DANELLE WELLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS BODYLABSF, MARIA RUTTER AND JAMES MURPHY ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED SEP-15-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUTTER, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-13-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF DANELLE WELLER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS MARIA RUTTER AND JAMES MURPHY INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF BODYLABSF. DEFENDANTS, BODYLABSF AND JAMES MURPHY, WAIVE PROCESS OF SERVICE. CASE SETTLED IN MEDIATION PROGRAM. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE FOR 6 MONTHS FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT BODYLABSF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLER, DANELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BODYLABSF RUTTER, MARIA MURPHY, JAMES $5,584.60 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,714.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE: FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLER, DANELLE AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, JAMES
